top_signals.title: France Launches Plan to Cut Fertilizer Import Reliance
top_signals.summary: France will support a €2 billion ($2.3 billion) industrial investment program to cut dependence on costly fertilizer imports in an effort to shield farmers from future supply disruptions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: PayPal seeks to increase use of PYUSD stablecoin with native issuance on Polygon
top_signals.summary: The company said its stablecoin will now be issued natively on Polygon, in addition to becoming available through Polygon's Open Money Stack.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
